$comment: Codebase Intelligence MCP config template. 'codebase-intel' exposes the code-understanding engine to any MCP host (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Claude Code) or agent. Replace ${VARS} with secrets from your environment/secret manager — never commit real tokens.

codebase-intel.description: Ask grounded questions about a codebase, search code, and analyze change impact.

github.description: Optional: enrich answers with PR/issue/blame history.
